description.from: Implement the story by loading FeedbackItems samples in the feedback evaluation command and providing them to AccuracyEvaluation as labeled_samples. Add executable coverage for the no-data-section path.
description.to: Implement the no-feedback story by tightening feedback-window dataset reuse and marking variants as no_data when no feedback-derived rows exist. This replaces the earlier suspected explicit-sample handoff; user clarified the score has no feedback samples, so no evaluations should be dispatched for that window.

title.to: Skip frontier evaluations when feedback window has no rows
